modelResponses.text: The tool is discovered. Now let me run the audit against the default demo site.

Here is the structured **UI/UX Audit Report** for the demo website:

---

## 🔍 UI/UX Audit Report — `https://playwright.dev`

| # | Severity | Finding | Location | Repro Steps | Suggested Fix |
|---|----------|---------|----------|-------------|---------------|
| 1 | 🟡 **Medium** | **Low visual hierarchy on hero section** | `/` — Hero section | 1. Navigate to the homepage. 2. Observe the primary heading and supporting text. 3. Note that both have similar font weight and contrast, making it hard to distinguish the main message at a glance. | Increase the heading `font-size` / `font-weight` (e.g., bump to `3rem` / `700`) and reduce secondary text prominence (lighter color or smaller size) to create a clear visual hierarchy. |
| 2 | 🟢 **Low** | **No explicit keyboard focus styling** | Global — all interactive elements (links, buttons, inputs) | 1. Open the site in any page. 2. Press `Tab` to navigate through interactive elements. 3. Observe that focus outlines are inconsistent or barely visible depending on the browser. | Define a universal, high-contrast `:focus-visible` style (e.g., `outline: 3px solid #1a73e8; outline-offset: 2px;`) across all interactive components to meet **WCAG 2.1 §2.4.7**. |

---

### 📊 Summary

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| **Total Findings** | 2 |
| **Critical** | 0 |
| **Medium** | 1 |
| **Low** | 1 |
| **Overall Verdict** | ✅ Site is **usable** but needs stronger information hierarchy and accessibility-focused interaction states. |

### 🛠️ Recommended Priority Actions
1. **Immediate** — Rework the hero section's typographic scale to establish a clear content hierarchy.
2. **Short-term** — Implement a global `:focus-visible` style to ensure keyboard navigability meets accessibility standards.

---

```json
{
  "siteUrl": "https://playwright.dev",
  "totalFindings": 2,
  "findings": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "severity": "medium",
      "title": "Low visual hierarchy on hero section",
      "location": "/ hero",
      "description": "Primary heading and supporting text have similar weight and contrast, reducing scannability.",
      "reproSteps": [
        "Navigate to the homepage.",
        "Observe the hero section heading and subtext.",
        "Note similar font weight/contrast between elements."
      ],
      "suggestedFix": "Increase heading size/weight and reduce secondary text prominence for clearer hierarchy."
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "severity": "low",
      "title": "No explicit keyboard focus styling",
      "location": "Global interactive elements",
      "description": "Interactive elements rely on default browser focus outline with inconsistent visibility.",
      "reproSteps": [
        "Open any page on the site.",
        "Press Tab to cycle through interactive elements.",
        "Observe inconsistent or invisible focus indicators."
      ],
      "suggestedFix": "Define a consistent, high-contrast :focus-visible ring across all interactive components."
    }
  ],
  "summary": "Site is usable but needs stronger information hierarchy and accessibility-focused interaction states."
}
```

Let me know if you'd like a deeper dive into any specific page or category (accessibility, performance, mobile responsiveness, etc.).
